creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
Thanks for the big picture reminder, Baptiste.  Hopefully I'm not being obnoxious or obtuse about this.

It might just be throwing me off that the new system-wide screenrc defaults are so visually different from screen's default look.

If not for the drastic visual difference, I probably wouldn't have noticed (I set a lot of those other tweaks myself in my per-user screenrc, as well).
